_note: Per-lesson role-play scenario. Grounded in A2/011 dialogue + vocab. Learner plays Leo; computer plays Mia. Each NPC node offers 2-3 branches so the same lesson language can be reached different ways. Consumed by RP.Engine + RP.classifiers.local (see roleplay/).
title: 011 · Recycling at Home

npc.text: What are you doing with those bottles?

routes.meaning: Leo says he is putting the bottles in the recycling bin.
examples: I am putting them in the recycling bin.
I'm putting them in the recycling bin.
I am putting the bottles in the recycling bin.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “I am putting them in the recycling bin.”

routes.meaning: Leo says he is recycling them.
routes.hint: You can say “I am putting them in the recycling bin.”

partial.message: Tell Mia what you're doing: “I am putting them in the recycling bin.”

off_topic.message: Mia asked about the bottles. Say “I am putting them in the recycling bin.”

npc.text: Oh, recycling! Where do they go?

routes.meaning: Leo says they go in the recycling bin.
examples: I put them in the recycling bin.
They go in the recycling bin.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “I am putting them in the recycling bin.”

routes.meaning: Leo says it is good for the Earth.
examples: Because it is good for the Earth.
It is good for the Earth.
Because recycling is good for the Earth.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Because it is good for the Earth.”

routes.meaning: Leo says it helps the planet.
routes.hint: You can say “Because it is good for the Earth.”

partial.message: Give your reason: “Because it is good for the Earth.”

off_topic.message: Mia asked why. Say “Because it is good for the Earth.”

npc.text: That is nice. So it helps nature?

routes.meaning: Leo confirms it is good for the Earth.
examples: Yes, it is good for the Earth.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Because it is good for the Earth.”

partial.message: Say “Yes, it is good for the Earth.”

off_topic.message: Tell Mia “It is good for the Earth.”

routes.meaning: Leo lists paper, glass, and plastic.
examples: We can recycle paper, glass, and plastic.
We recycle paper, glass, and plastic.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “We can recycle paper, glass, and plastic.”

routes.meaning: Leo names one thing to recycle.
routes.hint: You can list more: “We can recycle paper, glass, and plastic.”

partial.message: List them: “We can recycle paper, glass, and plastic.”

off_topic.message: Mia asked what to recycle. Say “We can recycle paper, glass, and plastic.”

npc.text: Just plastic? What else can we recycle?

examples: We can recycle paper, glass, and plastic.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “We can recycle paper, glass, and plastic.”

partial.message: Add more: “We can recycle paper, glass, and plastic.”

off_topic.message: Tell Mia “We can recycle paper, glass, and plastic.”

npc.text: I throw everything in the trash.

routes.meaning: Leo says Mia should recycle too.
Leo says trash is bad for the Earth.
examples: That is not good for the Earth.
That is bad for the planet.
routes.hint: You can advise her: “You should recycle, too.”

off_topic.message: Mia uses the trash. Say “You should recycle, too.”

npc.text: Oh no! What should I do instead?

routes.meaning: Leo says together they can keep the planet clean.
examples: Together we can keep our planet clean.
Together we keep the planet clean.
Together we can keep our planet clean!
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Together we can keep our planet clean.”
You can praise her, or say “Together we can keep our planet clean.”

partial.message: End as a team: “Together we can keep our planet clean.”

off_topic.message: Mia will start today. Say “Together we can keep our planet clean.”

npc.text: Thanks! It feels good to help. What is next?

routes.meaning: Leo says they can keep the planet clean together.
examples: Together we can keep our planet clean.
We can keep our planet clean.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Together we can keep our planet clean.”

partial.message: Say “Together we can keep our planet clean.”

off_topic.message: Tell Mia “Together we can keep our planet clean.”

npc.text: Yes! Together we can keep our planet clean. Thank you, Leo!
